match.userMessage:
Locked extreme close-up macro frame on Scarlett's hand gripping the coral lipstick. The bullet dips steadily into the clear shallow tidal pool water with droplets already beading on the cap, then the hand lifts and blots the product onto the back of the wrist in one smooth motion. Gentle ripples spread across the water surface under bright natural afternoon light with clean directional shadows. Subtle water droplets roll down the lipstick tube and catch the warm coastal glow.

Ambient sounds: gentle water ripples in tidal pool. subtle water dip, soft skin blot.
